overall.description: Surreal game engine footage depicting first-person flight through a distorted European city street filled with massive levitating boulders covered in vegetation. The environment features wavy, undulating asphalt ground textures and historic apartment buildings lining the path, with PlayStation controller UI visible at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: surreal urban canyon with massive floating boulders

agents.ego_description: floating steadily forward through narrow passage between massive levitating moss-covered boulders

entered.detail: massive dark rock with green vegetation on top hovering close to left side
massive dark rock with red and green patches hovering close to right side
colorful multi-story residential building with orange and yellow facade
light-colored stone apartment building with multiple windows
distorted undulating black asphalt surface with geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a surreal narrow urban canyon with massive floating boulders hovering on both sides. The camera floats forward through the wavy asphalt street, passing colorful European apartment buildings while navigating between the levitating rock formations.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with scattered floating rocks

events.description: exits narrow canyon into wider open plaza with more sky visibility

agents.ego_description: navigating through open intersection area with wider view of surrounding architecture

entered.detail: tall white residential building with distinctive red roof and balconies
blue and white striped awning covering walkway on right side

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide urban plaza with full sky visibility. A prominent white apartment building with a red roof dominates the right side, while the camera continues floating forward through the distorted street. The floating boulders recede into the distance as the environment becomes more open.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved residential street with floating obstacles

events.description: begins turning right to follow curved street path

agents.ego_description: turning right while floating along curved street lined with white apartment buildings

entered.detail: large shadowy levitating boulder with rough surface texture
light brown stone building with arched windows appearing in distance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to follow a curved residential street, with the white apartment building now visible on the left side. New dark floating rocks appear on the right, and a tan building emerges in the distance as the path curves through the surreal cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow approach to large brick institutional building

events.description: enters shadowed narrow passage with significantly darker lighting

agents.ego_description: floating toward large brick building at end of narrowing street, entering darker corridor

entered.detail: imposing red brick institutional building with multiple windows at end of street

segments.scene_description: The final segment enters a darker, narrower passage approaching a large red brick building that dominates the view ahead. The lighting becomes significantly dimmer as the camera moves into the shadowed corridor, with the tan building now close on the left and dark floating rocks hovering near the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight through a surreal urban landscape that transforms from a narrow canyon of floating debris into a wide plaza before closing into a shadowed corridor. It begins by gliding through a tight street of wavy asphalt, navigating between massive levitating boulders and colorful European apartment buildings. As the camera moves forward, the environment opens into a wide urban plaza under a clear sky, where the boulders recede and a prominent white building with a red roof dominates the right side. The scene then shifts as the camera turns right to follow a curved residential street, passing new dark floating rocks and a distant tan building. Finally, the path narrows and the lighting dims significantly as the camera enters a shadowed passage, approaching a large red brick building that looms ahead.
